subcodes.first_line: This is a remembrance from the Lote-Tree of Love that hath descended upon the plain of the heart, and a fire from the sanctuary of nearness that blazeth upon the Mount [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: این ذکری است از سدره حب که بر ساحت دل نازل است و ناری است از مکمن قرب که در طور
subcodes.subjects: @mystical themes, @symbolism, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @love as fire
